title: Automation emails - Mirror columns not populating?
excerpt: I am using an automation to send a custom email for a status change.  The email template pulls both regular and mirrored columns from my board (all were available as possible columns to choose from for the email).  We no…

posts.author: MondayMyco (K)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using an automation to send a custom email for a status change. The email template pulls both regular and mirrored columns from my board (all were available as possible columns to choose from for the email). We noticed that a mirrored column (Request ID) doesn’t populate in the email. Monday bug, or am I doing something wrong?

posts.author: MondayMyco (K)
posts.cookedHtml: The column in question shows as {pulse.mirror5} in the email template, but appears blank in the actual email. There is definitely data available to pull. Thanks again!

posts.author: Megna (Megna)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this mirroring a formula column by chance? I ran into this issue & it was because formula columns don’t work with automations (at least not currently). I needed to use a numbers column containing the value I wanted to be in the email.
